title: Disability Care and Rehabilitation Program Educational Objectives
content:
Disability Care and Rehabilitation Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To establish a more livable world for the disabled and to raise individuals who have the necessary knowledge and equipment for this livable world.

2. To raise individuals who can learn and apply their profession in both practical and theoretical areas and who can work independently or in teams by assuming responsibility in studies related to their field.

3. To raise individuals who analyze the problems of the disabled in integrating into society, the helplessness of the disabled, their exclusion from life, the negative situations of the individuals and who implement motivating approaches for these negative situations.
